__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: dimensionless thermoelectric figure of merit ZT for ZrNiSn half-Heusler at mid-T (Sb-doped Zr/Hf mass-fluctuation)

operating_conditions.measurement_geometry: in-plane on hot-pressed pellet (laser-flash κ + 4-probe ρ + Seebeck)

model_caveat: ZT is a composite property: ZT = S^2·σ·T / κ_total, where σ + S come from electronic structure (CHGNet domain) and κ_total = κ_e + κ_lat — κ_lat needs phonon-mean-free-path (ALIGNN line-graph or M3GNet phonon-graph proxy). The ZT 1.5 @ 873 K value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: best-reported lab pellet ZT for Zr/Hf-mass-fluctuated + Sb-doped ZrNiSn half-Heusler. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE — no NNP today predicts κ_lat to better than ± 30%.
proxy_source: Sakurada & Shutoh 2005 Appl. Phys. Lett. 86:082105 (Hf-Zr-Ni-Sn half-Heusler ZT 1.5 @ 700 K initial report) + Yu & Chen 2018 Adv. Energy Mater. 8:1801313 (Sb-doped ZrNiSn ZT 1.5 @ 873 K with Zr/Hf mass-fluctuation) + Snyder/Tritt half-Heusler corpus (review Snyder Nat. Mater. 2008; module-level ZT ~ 0.5-0.7 typical, 30-50% below pellet value)
falsifier_text: ZT @ 800 K < 1.5 OR 1000 K stability < 100 h → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: Sn-vacancy concentration drift at high-T HARD_WALL (volatilization above 1000 K → composition shift → ZT drop per Berry 2019 J. Mater. Chem. A)
Hf supply scarcity SOFT_WALL (commercial Hf production ~ 100 t/yr worldwide)
module-level ZT typically 30-50% below pellet ZT due to contact resistance
half-Heusler MODULES NOT YET COMMERCIAL at any vendor as of 2026 — production-scale UNVERIFIED
honesty_caveats: ZT 1.5 hits the falsifier floor exactly at the temperature it specifies (800 K) — MARGINAL, not PASS. The 1000 K stability arm of F-TE-HALF-ZRNISN-1 is the binding falsifier: Sn-vacancy HARD_WALL says composition drifts there. Marlow / Phononic / Komatsu (vendor authority for Bi-Te modules) do NOT yet manufacture half-Heusler modules. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; vendor authority Marlow Industries / Phononic / Komatsu (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
